guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 2. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_t: Point to the big T and say: tttttt. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_p: Now point to the big P and say: pppppp.

parent_story: Pat the tiger saw a tiny pot. Tap, tap, tap! Pat tapped on the pot and giggled.
